name: setup-notifyer
description: Scripts for setting up and managing a Notifyer account — signup, login, team, roles, labels, API keys

scripts.check: node --check scripts/create-account.js && node --check scripts/login.js && node --check scripts/get-me.js && node --check scripts/get-connection-status.js && node --check scripts/refresh-connection.js && node --check scripts/list-plans.js && node --check scripts/get-user-plan.js && node --check scripts/list-members.js && node --check scripts/invite-member.js && node --check scripts/update-member.js && node --check scripts/remove-member.js && node --check scripts/list-labels.js && node --check scripts/create-label.js && node --check scripts/update-label-keywords.js && node --check scripts/delete-label.js && node --check scripts/get-api-key.js && node --check scripts/doctor.js && echo 'All scripts OK'
